title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente
Beat eggs with grated cheese and black pepper
Drain pasta and mix with pancetta
Remove from heat and quickly mix in egg mixture

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 2 hours
Sauté onions and garlic until soft
Add tomatoes and spices, cook for 15 minutes
Add grilled chicken and simmer for 10 minutes

title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
summary: Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies that are crispy on the outside and chewy inside.
instructions: Mix in flour and baking soda
